'''yapoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squad|squad]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squad|squad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yapoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæpeketh|yæpeketh]] || [[word:yæpekej|yæpekej]] || [[word:yæpekesh|yæpekesh]] || [[word:yæpeke|yæpeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yapopokoth|yapopokoth]] || [[word:yapopokoj|yapopokoj]] || [[word:yapopokosh|yapopokosh]] || [[word:yapopoko|yapopoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yapokoth|yapokoth]] || [[word:yapokoj|yapokoj]] || [[word:yapokosh|yapokosh]] || [[word:yapoko|yapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yapofkoth|yapofkoth]] || [[word:yapofkoj|yapofkoj]] || [[word:yapofkosh|yapofkosh]] || [[word:yapofkof|yapofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yapokotho|yapokotho]] || [[word:yapokojo|yapokojo]] || [[word:yapokosho|yapokosho]] || [[word:yapokoko|yapokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yapokoth|yapokoth]] || [[word:yapokoj|yapokoj]] || [[word:yapokosh|yapokosh]] || [[word:yapoko|yapoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yapokothol|yapokothol]] || [[word:yapokojol|yapokojol]] || [[word:yapokoshol|yapokoshol]] || [[word:yapokokol|yapokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yapokothotho|yapokothotho]] || [[word:yapokojojo|yapokojojo]] || [[word:yapokoshosho|yapokoshosho]] || [[word:yapokoko|yapokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yapokothon|yapokothon]] || [[word:yapokojon|yapokojon]] || [[word:yapokoshon|yapokoshon]] || [[word:yapokokon|yapokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yapokothoro|yapokothoro]] || [[word:yapokojoro|yapokojoro]] || [[word:yapokoshoro|yapokoshoro]] || [[word:yapokokoro|yapokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
